name: xf_cep_acc_updel_flush_plain
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x"); $c : count() ) then end
_finding: D-155 residual -> D-160 FIXED (graduated): same-epoch UPDATE-then-DELETE where the update brings the fact INTO a plain accumulate (evented source). Drools executes each queued entry incrementally - the upd entry folds it in and dirties the result, the delete folds it out; the terminal fires the NET-ZERO value (W:0). Fix: external upd/del of EVENT-TYPED acc sources queue as acc_pending entries executed FIFO at the fire drain against epoch-final fields with ENTRY-ORDER aliveness; a Del that annihilates a drain-staged ins force-re-emits every left (Phase D).
